name: Crayola Clicks Retractable Tip Markers (10ct), Washable Cone Tip Art Marker Set, Cute Aesthetic School Supplies, Classroom Must Haves, Ages 3+
bullets: CRAYOLA RETRACTABLE MARKERS: Includes 10 Retractable Crayola Markers in assorted colors. (Additional colors and shades are available in the 20ct set (sold separately)).
WASHABLE MARKERS: Crayola Washable Markers for kids feature a nontoxic formula that's washable from skin and most washable clothing.
EASTER BASKET ESSENTIAL: A colorful Easter basket essential that makes the perfect Easter basket stuffer or spring craft gift, adding creative Crayola fun to any Easter celebration all year long.
VALENTINE’S DAY CARD-MAKING SUPPLIES: A colorful pick for crafting homemade valentines—great for classroom exchange prep, decorating cards, and adding bright details to heartfelt messages.
ART SUPPLIES FOR KIDS: These vibrant markers are perfect for classroom activities, art projects, and coloring books. Great for teachers and kids enhancing their art supplies.
CONE TIP: Each marker features a cone tip that allows for both fine lines and broad strokes, making them versatile for various art projects.
description: Get ready for the new school year with Crayola Retractable Markers! This set includes 10 assorted colors, perfect for all your classroom needs. These markers are washable, making them easy to clean from skin and most clothing. With long-lasting ink, you won’t have to worry about them running dry, making them perfect for school projects and at-home doodling. As the back-to-school season approaches, these markers are a must-have for teachers preparing their classrooms and students stocking up on supplies.
